title: aidia auriculata var. auriculata
intro: Aidia auriculata var. auriculata, also known as the Goldthread vine or Goldthread, is a perennial plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is a woody climber or shrub with medicinal properties, traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Aidia auriculata var. auriculata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to exhibit anti-cancer and anti-diabetic activities. Herbal preparations of the plant include extracts, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, capsules, and other supplements for medicinal purposes.
